202.reason: [If the input contains a single '&' or '|', it will not be found in the delimiter map (which only contains "&&" and "||"), resulting in lexType being null. This violates the requirement to detect error type 'a' for standalone '&' or '|'.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [If the input contains a single '&' or '|', it will not be found in the delimiter map (which only contains "&&" and "||"), resulting in lexType being null. This violates the requirement to detect error type 'a' for standalone '&' or '|'.]
